title: Log #009: UI & Systems Overhaul Update
desc: A massive foundational update introducing a fully featured settings system, a responsive industrial HUD, dynamic time controls, an analytics dashboard, and seamless async loading screens.

title: Log #008.5: Developer Tooling & Multi-Map Architecture
desc: Massive core engine refactoring to support multi-map architecture, advanced developer tooling, and a fully persistent profile-based save system.

title: Log #008: The Economy Overhaul
desc: Transitioned to a full tycoon economy with exponential scaling, complex production chains, centralized pricing logic, and the new Headquarters progression hub.

title: Log #007: Bigger Builds, Smarter Layouts
desc: Multi-tile architecture completely overhauls base-building, bringing real scale, designated road connections, and deeper layout strategy to the factory floor.

title: Log #006: Economy Overhaul & Smart Systems
desc: Massive performance upgrades with a fully event-driven architecture, the introduction of the Headquarters building, and a robust new per-resource Commodities Market.

title: Log #005.5: System Refactor & Performance Upgrade
desc: Major MVC-inspired refactoring to completely decouple the UI from core game logic, plus event-driven optimisations to massively boost performance.

title: Log #005: UI Overhaul & Market System
desc: Massive UI upgrades with dynamic data-driven systems, a new scalable Market Board, and extended save system compatibility.

title: Log #004: Smarter Trucks, Better Flow & Clearer Feedback
desc: Major AI upgrades for traffic queuing, multi-resource logistics fixes, and new visual feedback systems including the "Matrix Mode" data overlay.

title: Log #003: Save System, Smarter Trucks & Stability
desc: The game now SAVES everything! Huge stability upgrades, smarter truck AI, and the implementation of a structured JSON persistence layer.

title: Log #002: Logistics & Logic Progress
desc: Advanced road systems, smart junctions, global fleet economy, and fully data-driven truck inventories are now live in Alpha v0.0002.

title: Log #001: Automation & Efficiency
desc: The Woodcutter Sawmill is live! Implementing smart logistics, auto-loading trucks, and the new multidimensional grid architecture...
